mapper.select:
SELECT /*+ INDEX_ASC(A PPS_AGENT_STM_PK) */ TO_CHAR(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYY-MM') BILL_MONTH, BASIC_CARD_SD, BASIC_CASH_SD, BASIC_DEP_SD, GRADE_CARD_SD, GRADE_CASH_SD, GRADE_DEP_SD, MB_CARD_SD, MB_CASH_SD, MB_DEP_SD, UL_CARD_SD, UL_CASH_SD, UL_DEP_SD, CMS_CARD_SD, CMS_CASH_SD, CMS_DEP_SD, USIM_CARD_SD, USIM_CASH_SD, USIM_DEP_SD, RCG_CARD_SD, RCG_CASH_SD, RCG_DEP_SD, REFUND_FREE_RCG_AMT, REFUND_CARD_SD, REFUND_CASH_SD, REFUND_DEP_SD, MOD_CARD_SD, MOD_CASH_SD, MOD_DEP_SD, MOD_AGENT_CARD_SD, MOD_AGENT_CASH_SD, MOD_AGENT_DEP_SD, CARD_SD, CASH_SD, DEP_SD, END_FLAG, TO_CHAR(END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END_DT, END_ADMIN, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(END_ADMIN) END_ADMIN_NM, REMARK, REG_ADMIN, F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN) REG_ADMIN_NM, TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') REG_DT FROM PPS_AGENT_STM A WHERE 1=1
AND BILL_MONTH >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM')
AND BILL_MONTH < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM'),1)

SELECT /*+ INDEX_ASC(A PPS_AGENT_STM_PK) */ NVL(TO_CHAR(BILL_MONTH, 'YYYY-MM'),'-') AS BILL_MONTH, NVL(BASIC_CARD_SD,0) AS BASIC_CARD_SD, NVL(BASIC_CASH_SD,0) AS BASIC_CASH_SD, NVL(BASIC_DEP_SD,0) AS BASIC_DEP_SD, NVL(GRADE_CARD_SD,0) AS GRADE_CARD_SD, NVL(GRADE_CASH_SD,0) AS GRADE_CASH_SD, NVL(GRADE_DEP_SD,0) AS GRADE_DEP_SD, NVL(MB_CARD_SD,0) AS MB_CARD_SD, NVL(MB_CASH_SD,0) AS MB_CASH_SD, NVL(MB_DEP_SD,0) AS MB_DEP_SD, NVL(UL_CARD_SD,0) AS UL_CARD_SD, NVL(UL_CASH_SD,0) AS UL_CASH_SD, NVL(UL_DEP_SD,0) AS UL_DEP_SD, NVL(CMS_CARD_SD,0) AS CMS_CARD_SD, NVL(CMS_CASH_SD,0) AS CMS_CASH_SD, NVL(CMS_DEP_SD,0) AS CMS_DEP_SD, NVL(USIM_CARD_SD,0) AS USIM_CARD_SD, NVL(USIM_CASH_SD,0) AS USIM_CASH_SD, NVL(USIM_DEP_SD,0) AS USIM_DEP_SD, NVL(RCG_CARD_SD,0) AS RCG_CARD_SD, NVL(RCG_CASH_SD,0) AS RCG_CASH_SD, NVL(RCG_DEP_SD,0) AS RCG_DEP_SD, NVL(REFUND_FREE_RCG_AMT,0) AS REFUND_FREE_RCG_AMT, NVL(REFUND_CARD_SD,0) AS REFUND_CARD_SD, NVL(REFUND_CASH_SD,0) AS REFUND_CASH_SD, NVL(REFUND_DEP_SD,0) AS REFUND_DEP_SD, NVL(MOD_CARD_SD,0) AS MOD_CARD_SD, NVL(MOD_CASH_SD,0) AS MOD_CASH_SD, NVL(MOD_DEP_SD,0) AS MOD_DEP_SD, NVL(MOD_AGENT_CARD_SD,0) AS MOD_AGENT_CARD_SD, NVL(MOD_AGENT_CASH_SD,0) AS MOD_AGENT_CASH_SD, NVL(MOD_AGENT_DEP_SD,0) AS MOD_AGENT_DEP_SD, NVL(CARD_SD,0) AS CARD_SD, NVL(CASH_SD,0) AS CASH_SD, NVL(DEP_SD,0) AS DEP_SD, NVL(END_FLAG,'-') AS END_FLAG, NVL(TO_CHAR(END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'-') AS END_DT, NVL(END_ADMIN,'-') AS END_ADMIN, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(END_ADMIN),'-') AS END_ADMIN_NM, NVL(REMARK,'-') AS REMARK, NVL(REG_ADMIN,'-') AS REG_ADMIN, NVL(F_GET_ADMIN_NM(REG_ADMIN),'-') AS REG_ADMIN_NM, NVL(TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),'-') AS REG_DT FROM PPS_AGENT_STM A WHERE 1=1
AND BILL_MONTH >= TO_DATE(#{startDt}, 'YYYY-MM')
AND BILL_MONTH < ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{endDt}, 'YYYY-MM'),1)
SELECT GROUP_ID value, GROUP_NAME text FROM PPS_AGENT_STM_GROUP ORDER BY GROUP_ID ASC

SELECT DTL_CD, CODE_A_TYPE, CODE_A_COMBO, CODE_A_HEAD_NM, CODE_A_MOD_FLAG, CODE_B_TYPE, CODE_B_COMBO, CODE_B_HEAD_NM, CODE_B_MOD_FLAG, CODE_C_TYPE, CODE_C_COMBO, CODE_C_HEAD_NM, CODE_C_MOD_FLAG, CODE_D_TYPE, CODE_D_HEAD_NM, CODE_D_COMBO, CODE_D_MOD_FLAG, CODE_E_TYPE, CODE_E_HEAD_NM, CODE_E_COMBO, CODE_E_MOD_FLAG, STM_COMBO, DEL_FLAG, REMARK FROM PPS_AGENT_STM_CODE A WHERE 1=1
AND DTL_CD = #{dtlCd}

SELECT CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'DD') < 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END DT_FLAG, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_AGENT_STM_AGENT WHERE BILL_MONTH = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND ROWNUM = 1) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AGENT_FLAG, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_AGENT_STM WHERE BILL_MONTH = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND ROWNUM = 1) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END STM_FLAG, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PPS_AGENT_STM WHERE BILL_MONTH = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND END_FLAG = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1) = 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END_FLAG FROM DUAL
